mapper.sql: select menu_id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, null as `query`, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, ifnull(perms, '') as perms, icon, is_platform_only, ifnull(default_open_to_customer,'0') as default_open_to_customer, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, remark, delete_by, delete_time, ifnull(del_flag,'0') as del_flag from sb_menu
mapper.select: select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, null as `query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, ifnull(m.is_platform_only,'0') as is_platform_only, null as customer_menu_status, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.create_by, m.update_by, m.remark, m.delete_by, m.delete_time from sb_menu m inner join sb_customer_menu cm on cm.menu_id = m.menu_id and cm.customer_id = #{customerId} and cm.delete_time is null and ifnull(cm.is_enabled,'1') = '1' where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = '0' and ifnull(m.is_platform_only,'0') = '0' and ifnull(m.del_flag,'0') = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, null as `query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, ifnull(m.is_platform_only,'0') as is_platform_only, null as customer_menu_status, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.create_by, m.update_by, m.remark, m.delete_by, m.delete_time from sb_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = '0' and ifnull(m.del_flag,'0') = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.menu_id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, null as `query`, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, ifnull(m.is_platform_only,'0') as is_platform_only, (select ifnull(cm2.status,'0') from sys_user u2 inner join sb_customer_menu cm2 on cm2.customer_id = u2.customer_id and cm2.menu_id = m.menu_id and cm2.delete_time is null and ifnull(cm2.is_enabled,'1') = '1' where u2.user_id = #{userId} and u2.customer_id is not null limit 1) as customer_menu_status, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.create_by, m.update_by, m.remark, m.delete_by, m.delete_time from sb_menu m where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = '0' and ifnull(m.del_flag,'0') = '0' and exists (select 1 from sb_user_permission_menu upm where upm.menu_id = m.menu_id and upm.user_id = #{userId} and upm.delete_time is null) and ( exists (select 1 from sys_user u where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.customer_id is null) or exists ( select 1 from sys_user u inner join sb_customer_menu cm on cm.customer_id = u.customer_id and cm.menu_id = m.menu_id and cm.delete_time is null and ifnull(cm.is_enabled,'1') = '1' and ifnull(cm.status,'0') = '0' where u.user_id = #{userId} ) ) order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
mapper.insert: insert into sb_menu( menu_id, parent_id, menu_name, order_num, path, component, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, perms, icon, remark, create_by, del_flag, default_open_to_customer, create_time ) values( #{menuId}, #{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{orderNum}, #{path}, #{component}, #{isFrame}, #{isCache}, #{menuType}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{perms}, #{icon}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, ifnull(#{delFlag},'0'), ifnull(#{defaultOpenToCustomer},'0'), sysdate() )
mapper.select: where ifnull(del_flag,'0') = '0' and menu_name = #{menuName} and parent_id = #{parentId} limit 1

select distinct m.perms from sb_menu m where m.status = '0' and ifnull(m.del_flag,'0') = '0' and m.perms is not null and m.perms != '' and ( exists (select 1 from sb_user_permission_menu upm where upm.menu_id = m.menu_id and upm.user_id = #{userId} and upm.delete_time is null) or exists ( select 1 from sb_role_menu rm inner join sb_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id and ur.user_id = #{userId} and (ur.delete_time is null) inner join sb_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id and ifnull(r.del_flag,'0') = '0' and ifnull(r.status,'0') = '0' where rm.menu_id = m.menu_id and (rm.delete_time is null) ) )

select distinct m.perms from sb_menu m where m.status = '0' and ifnull(m.del_flag,'0') = '0' and m.perms is not null and m.perms != '' and ( exists (select 1 from sb_user_permission_menu upm where upm.menu_id = m.menu_id and upm.user_id = #{userId} and upm.delete_time is null) or exists ( select 1 from sb_role_menu rm inner join sb_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id and ur.user_id = #{userId} and (ur.delete_time is null) inner join sb_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id and ifnull(r.del_flag,'0') = '0' and ifnull(r.status,'0') = '0' where rm.menu_id = m.menu_id and (rm.delete_time is null) ) ) and ( (#{customerId} is null or #{customerId} = '') or exists ( select 1 from sb_customer_menu cm where cm.menu_id = m.menu_id and cm.customer_id = #{customerId} and cm.delete_time is null and ifnull(cm.is_enabled,'1') = '1' and ifnull(cm.status,'0') = '0' ) )

WITH RECURSIVE tree AS ( SELECT menu_id FROM sb_menu WHERE menu_id = '01900000-0000-7000-8000-000000001450' AND ifnull(del_flag,'0') = '0' UNION ALL SELECT m.menu_id FROM sb_menu m INNER JOIN tree t ON m.parent_id = t.menu_id WHERE ifnull(m.del_flag,'0') = '0' ) SELECT t.menu_id FROM tree t INNER JOIN sb_menu m ON m.menu_id = t.menu_id WHERE (m.is_platform_only = '0' OR m.is_platform_only IS NULL) AND m.status = '0' AND ifnull(m.del_flag,'0') = '0'
SELECT menu_id FROM sb_menu WHERE ifnull(del_flag,'0') = '0' AND status = '0' AND ifnull(default_open_to_customer,'0') = '1' AND (is_platform_only = '0' OR is_platform_only IS NULL)
mapper.update: update sb_menu set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate(), del_flag = '1' where menu_id = #{menuId}
